reviews.review_description: Love this. Think it has great potential. But please can we have teleport option to move, as i suffer with terrible motion sickness. then i can fully explore.

developer_response.body:
thanks so much for your kind words and request, I will absolutely try achieve this for you! In the interim here is my best advice to help!
1. move slowly. pressing the thumbstick gently will move the player slowly. this can really help! 
2. try sit down in a spinning desk chair, this can help ground you and spinning with your feet can feel very natural and gives a more powerful sense of "spatial awareness" while in VR
3. practice makes perfect! the more time you spend in VR the less likely you will feel this way. so if new to VR, hang in there, it will definately fade away! But dont worry if you are a long time user, I will try bring some better features to help asap.

reviews.review_description: Subscribed to it sorry to say and can't find a way to unsubscribe

developer_response.body: Hi Sulley, Do you mean to the email list? if so, please just visit www.myxmetaverse.com and drop us an email and we can help ensure you are removed from the mailing list if needed.

reviews.review_description: In all honesty, there are other options out there that offer more. It’s just another clubbing world that you can find in anywhere. Sorry but nothing new here.

developer_response.body: dude... ? You were so excited about this app, you joined the team. ill DM you about this.

reviews.review_description: This app is so pretty, I can see so much potential here. It can be a little quiet at times, but when these people throw a party it is so much fun! I had no idea I could "go out" from home and meet new people and hear great music. It's like a festival in your living room! I can't wait to see what's next.

developer_response.body: aww, thanks so much for this kind review FunkyAviator. it means a lot! we hope to get lots more events and people together in 2024. we have kind of been keeping a bit of a low profile while we develop this, but are getting close to really pumping up the volume. keep coming back!  :)

reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed stumbling on this app. I have nightclub simulator (Which is more of a fun game then a nightclub experience) and hang out in some of the night clubs in Horizon Metaworlds (Which is more of a social chat experience then a nightclub). Honorouble mention VR chat which has nightclubs but is also mainly focused around chat.

MYX is the first VR app I have experienced that truly resmbles a club. With the lights and the music pumping it felt really immersive. I like the apartment and being able to design avatars that look good.

From the apartment you can sign up for a free account on the Television or a free DJ account if you use Trip app. There is a VIP signup which is on a reduction at time of writing. The events are listed on the screen, one doming up in November and some kind of New Years event based in ancient Egypt.

I’m looking forward to dropping into some of the events for some clubbing vibes.

I use another app called Multiverse where I have an apartment, it would be great if this app teamed up with Multiverse so the residents of the Infiniverse can go clubbing. I also sometimes serve coffee in the Soapstone Comedy Club. I wouldnt mind being a coat attendent, bar tender or something like that in one of the clubs, even the dude in the restroom that sells colognes, lol its all fun but I would totally sit there in VR and have a little job.

Anyway enough said, keep up the good work, looking forward to watching this app grow.

developer_response.body: thanks so much, I really appreciate this feedback and support :)

reviews.review_description: This is simply epic entertainment. From full city nightlife to tranquil moments on the beach, this one has it all. Clubs with fantastic music and laser light shows, plus much much more.  Mere words can not describe this amazing experience. Did I mention lasers and driving hovercraft? You must give this one a try. Look for me in there, I am on often, tell me if I am right!

developer_response.body: legendary review right here!! love it!! :)

reviews.review_title: A nightlife city district for adults 👍
reviews.review_description: A great place to hang out and explore. There are nightclub venues here that feature amazing DJ's streamed in live from Tribe XR in partnership with Pioneer and VIP yacht cruises that really give you a sense of presence within VR. I have met several people that hang out in MYX that I also spend time with on the MYX discord server to talk about upcoming DJ events, hang-out events, and other related and non related discussions. If your looking to make friends in VR or DJ and get noticed, this is a great place for you. I really enjoy the uncompromising adult vibe here.

developer_response.body: thanks so much for this great feedback and review. I am a solo developer creating this title currently, so it means the world to me to have your support. thanks

reviews.review_description: The graphics/ visual and sound effects in this game are mind blowing!!! With headphones on it just feels like you're in a real club. The developer is very open minded and is always open for suggestions and ideas. Here and there you can sometimes find a small bug but with the frequent updates it's very rapidly resolved😎. Recent updates have also added the "Holo" Dj sets so it looks like there are real people/DJ's performing in the clubs💯.

developer_response.body: thanks so much for the amazing feedback! that makes it all worth the hard work, and I appreciate it :) Paul

reviews.review_description:
Time Played: 45 minutes
VIP access: No

I'm fascinated by what a single programmer has already accomplished!

The clubs and surroundings look fantastic, the controls are very self-explanatory and kept simple. The game looks technically very good! (the NPCs could look a bit better xd)

I think the idea is great and the implementation of well-known DJs too!

unfortunately my experience could not start as desired

I was greeted with performance problems when I started the game, but they went away after a restart.

When entering the first club I was amazed and wanted to look around. When buying a beer bottle, 4 bottles came out and suddenly shot through the whole club (these are definitely bugs that will be fixed in the future)

When I was rocking along with the music while exploring the club, everything was suddenly quiet. After leaving the club and going back into the club, the music started all over again and the same thing happened again.
I've had that experience at every club I've entered.
in a period of 5 minutes the music just disappeared out of nowhere. This also happened after 3 restarts of the app.
at the third time my entire game sound was gone after about 10 minutes.

On the last try, however, everything went great and I had no performance problems, bugs, laggs or sound problems. everything went perfectly and I was able to enjoy Tita's set.

I was very engrossed in MYX and also had a lot of fun.

Overall I think MYX still has a way to go!
however, it can already provide a good insight into the virtual club scene!

Something I would love to see:

Live streaming implementation!
Meaning:
That u are able to input a Livestream URL for example Twitch ore Youtube so that you can host events with people djing live at the exact moment.

Lights that react to music.
one thing that would be really nice, is if the lights would match the sets or the music.

e.g. at a part of the set the music was very quiet and slow but the lights flashed like crazy.

developer_response.body: great ideas and feed back is noted! :)

reviews.review_description:
Would love to visit the clubs with friends. Should get a battery pack for my quest to stay longer.

Based on all the previous feedback and dev comments I'm hyped for the next update.

Is there a discord?

Edit: Created this review a long time ago, just after my first visit to MYX and it's only getting better. The community is great and the devs are lovers of the scene themselves and are nice to meet on discord and inside MYX.

Highly recommend this experience to meet like-minded people, enjoy the Holo dj sets or just load up a browser with your favorite livesets and enjoy them in virtual clubs.

developer_response.body: thanks so much VRHog, your long-term support is invaluable!

reviews.review_title: In a shaker: shots of life & music. MYX
reviews.review_description:
MYX is a truly unique app on the Quest 2 that has become an essential part of my VR experience. With its live-recorded DJ sets, stunning bars and clubs, and beautifully crafted virtual apartments, MYX has transformed from just another app to a cherished part of my daily routine.

From the moment I put on my headset and enter MYX, I feel a sense of calm wash over me. This app has a visceral quality to it that truly sets it apart from any other app or game on VR or even on a desktop. MYX has a "feel" to it that makes me feel like I'm really there.

One of my favorite things about MYX is the ability to use it as a relaxing getaway. I love hanging out in my virtual apartment, reading, surfing the internet, or just chilling out on the leather couch. It's the perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of my everyday life.

But MYX is not just a place to relax, it's also a vibrant social hub. I love catching up with old friends and meeting new ones at the virtual bars and clubs. And when I'm not in MYX, I find that it continues to impact and improve my life outside of VR as well. It adds depth and color to my life, with countless laughs and amazing people.

And when I'm having one of those days, MYX is the perfect place to escape. My virtual apartment is my safe haven where I can go to be alone and unwind. It is the place I wander when I’m all alone, and nobody knows it but me.

developer_response.body: what a killer review. thank you so much for your kind words. this means a lot  :)

reviews.review_description:
These app reviewers must be family members or on Ecstasy because it's a joke. This app is an example of what happens when a Clubber For Life meets a 3D Designer college graduate and throws him free drugs to build a VR app - convincing him and others who are easily influenced that his own personality and his vision for a VR club will take over the internet. 

Terrible UI, lots of fake avatars all over the place to make it seem social, you have to walk everywhere, and so much more is wrong with this app. The only thing right was the ecstasy on the bathroom sink - I got dizzy and quit the game. Never felt better.

developer_response.body: Lol, ok, bit dramatic but each to their own. thanks for playing MYX regardless :)

reviews.review_title: The Real Metaverse for all of US!
reviews.review_description: What can I say about this app!.. It provides us with private full immersive dwelling! as well as multiple areas of gameplay and interaction.  This is what the METAVERSE should be about.  I can chill in my "apartment" go see a show, hit a nightclub, go into a movie theater, use the podcast room, chill with others at a comedy store and many more! What makes this a better experience is the immersive realism that this application has brought forth (The detail/the experience/the sounds/the visuals).  I am excited to see where this evolves more to! . so far! I am 100% enjoying this app and everything about it including the community on discord!!! 100000 Points!!! for an amazing experience!!!!

developer_response.body: thanks so much Iss. I really appreciate this. :)

reviews.review_title: The Future of Clubbing and Entertainment
reviews.review_description:
I discovered this amazing app when it first came out, and it continues to evolve and blow my mind! The realism of the experience is absolutely top notch, unrivaled by any other social app. 

Want to go clubbing with friends who live around the world? Done! See concerts, create podcasts, kick back in the movie theater with friends, see a comedy show, drive a car in the desert… upon entering MYX we are transported into a world that’s engaging and envelops you into a fantasy meets reality world. 

Give this a try, join us!

developer_response.body: legend, thanks so much ArtIslove!!! :)

reviews.review_title: Are you ready to party like never before
reviews.review_description: Come to MYX Metaverse, the ultimate virtual night club and rave experience! With a variety of music, bands, virtual DJs and videos, you'll never run out of things to do. So grab your headset and come join the MYX Metaverse for an unforgettable night of dancing and socializing with full body avatar ( legs included) See you on the dance floor!

developer_response.body: Hell yea Kortes!! :)

reviews.review_title: How is this not more popular??
reviews.review_description:
This game has drivable cars(your friends can ride along), guns, your own apartment, YouTube(or any other website)
You can do virtual drugs, hit the dance floor and party with the wild crowd!
Play chess, visit 7/11, go for a swim, drink and jump from a skyscraper! 
Full body avatars, MULTI PLAYER! LETS GOOOOO!

developer_response.body: haha. this is the most awesome review. nice! :)

reviews.review_description:
This is still very much in beta so go easy. The city is sparse currently but the one main club is pretty great. The music is on point and I’ve wanted a dnb style clubbing experience in VR for a while. A couple other apps do an ok job of this but I think this could be big thing in VR.  The problem is nobody is ever online, so maybe having event times plastered around or getting notifications through the oculus app could help. 

There seems to be a strange focus on monetising this app by selling clubs or land in their “metaverse”, but this is a bit NFT/crypto bro 2020 thinking if you ask me. It isn’t a metaverse and that word is annoying to actual VR users, especially when it’s not a metaverse. It’s an app with a club and a flat and there’s no shame in that. 

All you need to do is have 2 or 3 clubs next to each other and your apartment opposite and this will be incredible.

developer_response.body: check out the latest updates! i took your feedback seriously, and have implemented much of your suggestions.  appreciated :)

reviews.review_title: Keep your eyes on this one
reviews.review_description:
Not a game but a proof of concept of something that has a huge potential!  This could be the GTA free roam type of game. So many ideas of how this could become, can’t wait to see where the developer is taking this! 

It’s only one guy doing this, so everyone throw money at him so we can keep his I.V filled with energy drinks…

developer_response.body: love this so much haha. :)

reviews.review_description:
I'm loving the progress of this app the latest update is fantastic it's goin to be amazing when it's completed .

First impression after the latest update was  Where's the car gone to the secret pool party that was a nice touch in the first one . My 2nd impression was walking into the forever festival gave me the WOW factor great job on that I felt I was in a dance tent at a festival Amazing. 

The safe space your own room amazing looking off the balcony fantastic.

Really  looking forward to seeing more on your next update 😀

developer_response.body: that is an awesome review - really appreciate it! Don't worry, things may disappear for a while as we develop this, but the good stuff will always return - the VIP parties and cyberpunk vibes are baked in :)

reviews.review_description: I love the game and its amazing! Just wish there was a way to dj in it and have live festivals. Also as an LD myself I would love to see like some sort of way you can control the lights and such. Also maybe effects like co2 etc. I know its early development but It has the ability to become something amazing!! Just listen to the reviews because a lot of people here have amazing ideas!!

developer_response.body: dont fret that is all coming my friend - in fact! make sure you join our discord" www.bit.ly/myxcommunity  -  i listen to EVERYTHING that is suggested. but a lot ive already got in the oven being prepared it just hasnt been put on the table yet. The abilty to DJ to a global audience, and even the ability to own run, and generate revenue from your own club is all coming.  :)

reviews.review_description:
Partying on VR is a dream itself and Myx is making it possible. I find it very promising and very well implement taking into account that is a beta version.

Good job guys!

developer_response.body: thanks so much for this great feedback. really appreciate it - the next update is looking very exciting... stay tuned.. its gunna get much, much better yet! :)

reviews.review_description: I love it so much The graphics are nice and the npcs and music is pretty good as well. can't wait for more districts to be added and more content. I contacted the dev and he told me that he will add youtube and a video player to watch videos on that mounted TV screen in the apartment which will be excellent just to chill and relax and take a break from clubbin. best clubbin/dance app so far for the meta quest.

developer_response.body: thanks so much for your great support as always Aaron :)

reviews.review_description:
Everything looks fantastic! I totally get that gritty club feeling. And it runs great on the Quest. I’m frankly surprised it runs on the Quest.

When I have the ability to see a DJ perform live with friends I know this app will truly shine. 

Is there a time frame when multiplayer will be released ?

developer_response.body: Thanks s much for enjoying this, its super appreciated! multiplayer is coming! I know you guys will be keen to try that, and i have a developer on it at present and that is his priority. it could be a month or two though, we need to get it right and do it well, (but tbh ill probably be too excited and rush it out haha)

reviews.review_description: I'm so excited about this project, stumbled upon by accident and now am checking daily for updates. Stepping out of my apartment and onto the street... Jaw on the floor! This will be a genre defining app. Awesome!

developer_response.body:
wow thanks so much! thats exactly what we want (and need!!)  to hear. 
we've been a little quiet, but that's only cause we are deep deep deep in the development of some amazing new features - including multiplayer. watch. this. space.

reviews.review_description: i hope that volves more and more.

developer_response.body: cheers to that my friend! :) thanks heaps for your support. new update coming this week

reviews.review_description: It's awesome and I really look forward to the multiplayer, the live festival and more to come. But I have a question I saw a video were you have a house and sort of a poolparty, how do you get there?

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! that is really appreciated :) 

yep so that home is accessed via the yellow mustang. you can enter at all times using the left hand door, or if you wait a minute a button will appear on the right as well. let me know if any probs  :)

reviews.review_title: Was good, but needs more love
reviews.review_description:
i used to love mix as it was progressing, 
but now with in your face as soon as your drop in VIP paid content,
 and the HORRIBLE Lag and lack of optimization anywhere, and half baked maps with no content or polish, i cant say i can suggest it anymore without some real work, re-thought and love put into it, 
Everyone want to nickel and dime you to death these days, 
but if the product isn't good i can't 
if i was i could see but , as it stands now, just no.

developer_response.body:
thanks for the review, important to note, just a single developer here trying his best to make a free product, with the option to upgrade to help support the project. by supporting MYX, you are actually helping us fight against the corporate rule of the metaverse! :)
what would you suggest a more suitable business model might be for the project, as always, I am making this with the community so will take your thoughts on board. (baring in mind of course, if we cant make money, we cant make the product)

reviews.review_description: Waiting for more users...

developer_response.body: love this! and yep, we will build it, and they will come. fortunately, we are also building lots of stuff that will mean you can enjoy it with or without friends. keep an eye on progress!

reviews.review_description: My favorite part of vr really is to just explore and soak in the environment, and when it's cyberpunk themed, wooo doggie. I love the people talking and the look of it all. It's not too dark, thankfully. You don't need to do any of this NFT stuff. Honestly, you should make a game.

developer_response.body: i love this answer haha. thanks so much byteframe. new update launching this week. buckle up! its gunna get wilder :)

reviews.review_description: Love this app, nice to see it improve  bot by bit...if it keeps improving this could be the next best social app to take over bigscreen ...Praise to the developers who I have met in the app... Great work... hope to see you releasing on meta store in the near future...

developer_response.body: thanks so much MagnusMax - same back at ya.

reviews.review_description: Loving it so far. when you bring in festival you could do some Christian festival for those of us who are religious. Thanks to the owner that helped me with the loading link for my avatar. really cool touch to bring in readyplayer.me avatars. Can't wait to see what you do next in the future updates.

developer_response.body: awesome feedback and absolutely re: Christian Festivals. cool idea. what we are working towards is the ability for organizations to create custom events - meaning you and some friends could conceivably host an event that people from all around the world could attend.thats what will make MYX special :)

reviews.review_title: By far BEST NIGHT-CLUBS for stand-alone
reviews.review_description:
The environments are crazy looking good. I never felt more immersed standing on these dance floors. You can always acces MYX but MYX really comes alive when users are gathering on set times. 
These gathering times you will find within the app or on there discord.
Joining a event feels so real, you have to check it out if you love music, well.. who doesn’t 😊.

- Futhings.

developer_response.body: legend review right here!!! :)

reviews.review_title: Fun and with loads of potential
reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed what I played so far. A few club scenes with NPC robots that seemed blacked in shadow. That was cool. Gave an illusion of a crowd at a club, especially the atmosphere. 

I anxiously await multiplayer, and private rooms. And the ability to choose my own music, for one room only, or a YouTube video for the unused festival room. Also different types of ceiling lights and DJ lights. Zig zag is nice, but not the end all be all. 

Would also love to control the "gender" of the shadow people. My gay friends and I usually only do these types of parties in gay clubs, so that "male figures" option would be nice. 

Lots of potential here, and the ability to control all aspects for a private server would be *chef's kiss*

developer_response.body: wow great feedback and ideas there cap616 I love the idea of controlling the gender of the crowd. that is really an interesting idea (and quite doable, ill note that and add it to the roadmap, might take a couple of months, but will come.) i actually plan to have quite a few districts yet and for businesses to own and run their own clubs, so the ability for players to gather up a group of friends and create their own club is coming too ;)

reviews.review_description: This is a ambitious game with a lot of potential definitely worth checking out

developer_response.body: thank you very much 81steff!

reviews.review_description: i love throwing bottles, swimming in the pool, dancing to music hey its a lifestyle

developer_response.body: haha :)

reviews.review_description: I tried this out last night and it's got huge potential, love how real everything is, was a bit annoyed drum and bass wasn't available in any of the venues I visited, looking forward to seeing this progress!

developer_response.body: drum and bass will be a core focus for us! we want DNB too! The radio station we were using Boosh.fm (a DNB radio station I helped setup actually many years ago!) recently dropped its webstream so just trying to find a new compatible channel. but do not fear, DNB will be coming back. :)

reviews.review_description: I am a producer/DJ engineer in Chicago. Definitely. Looks like alot of time and work involved,I definitely see potential. Would be quite profitable to have a other selective artists in the program for licensing music and paying for spotlight sections in certain areas. If you can market that idea in Sony would probably the first to put money in. Of course i got Free dibs since i gave you the idea. ;) I have it in detail. People have made lots of money on my ideas. hit me up if you need more detail. good work

developer_response.body:
thanks so much, bumpincityreload! appreciate this immensely! :) 
you are 100% right about that idea. I haven't quite approached Sony, but its on my to do list! step one was actually getting this multiplayer stuff rolled out, but that is now happening this week, keep an eye out for that update... its a big one. We are definitely looking to start a label of sorts inside the myx world. we want to help artists get a fair deal and believe NFTs/Blockchain tech could help us do that. you are spot on  ;)

reviews.review_description: BEST GAME EVERRRRR

developer_response.body: haha, this is the best comment EVERRRRRRR

reviews.review_description:
Hi, the game experience is really great. Thanks for creating it. :-) 
But i don't find the multiplayer option. We want to play it with 6 people. 
Does it work? Then you get 5 stars.

developer_response.body: thanks so much for the kind review! Yes, absolutely does have Multiplayer, simply head to the street via the exit door in the apartment, and you will be in the Multiplayer area. To meet friends there, simply head to the street at the same time. You should be able to locate each other from there :)

reviews.review_title: Great idea but need more development

developer_response.body: yep. sure does! fortunately, MYX is a live development, we are letting you check it out while we make it, (rather than wait till its done)
